author: spencer_tb
content:
cc-ing from the STEEL discord!
> 🧪 Our **`glamsterdam-denvet@v6.0.0`** release  is out!
> 
> -> https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/releases/tag/tests-glamsterdam-devnet@v6.0.0
> 
> PTAL at the release notes & the [test release tracker](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/issues/2915) for the full scope.
> 
> This release is built upon the previous `bal-devnet-7` spec, and note that there are a lot of spec changes including 5 new EIPs. Please be meticulous when running the tests as its possible a small bug has sneaked into our spec changes. EIP-8070 tests are deferred to a follow up release as it is not a consensus breaking EIP.
> 
> No "claude pass all the tests, make no mistakes" please 😅 !
